Class InformationFlowContractImpl

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.impl.InformationFlowContractImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
Contract, InformationFlowContract, SpecificationElement
public final class InformationFlowContractImpl extends Object implements InformationFlowContract
Standard implementation of the DependencyContract interface.

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface Contract

    Contract.OriginalVariables

    • map

      public InformationFlowContract map(UnaryOperator<JTerm> op, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      Specified by:
      map in interface Contract
      Specified by:
      map in interface InformationFlowContract
      Specified by:
      map in interface SpecificationElement
      Parameters:
      op - the operator to apply.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this specification element with the operator applied.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Returns the unique internal name of the specification element.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface SpecificationElement

    • id

      public int id()
      Description copied from interface: Contract
      Returns the id number of the contract. If a contract has instances for several methods (inheritance!), all instances have the same id. The id is either non-negative or equal to INVALID_ID.
      Specified by:
      id in interface Contract

      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement

    • toBeSaved

      public boolean toBeSaved()
      Description copied from interface: Contract
      Tells whether, on saving a proof where this contract is available, the contract should be saved too. (this is currently true for contracts specified directly in DL, but not for JML contracts)
      Specified by:
      toBeSaved in interface Contract
      Returns:
      see above

      public String proofToString(Services services)
      Description copied from interface: Contract
      Returns a parseable String representation of the contract. Precondition: toBeSaved() must be true.
      Specified by:

      Parameters:

      Returns:
